title: Recursive Containers, Stack Parsing, Depth, and Recovery · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: A preserved build trace contains one plausible source, path, encoding, metadata, parser, renderer, template, URL, asset, accessibility, security, cache, package, deployment, or release defect; locate the first failed boundary before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded nested-block parser and recovery trace and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Define base case, recursive reduction, returned state, source advancement, and invariant for nested document structures.
Use an explicit open-container stack where depth, continuation, closure, and source ownership need controlled iteration.
Reject or recover from excessive nesting before Python recursion, memory, or diagnostic output becomes unbounded.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.text: A debug publishing team handles case 5192 during a large technical reference incremental rebuild. Build deterministic Python evidence to bound recursive containers, guarantee source advancement, and retain recovery evidence; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then zoom a translated long-form page to 400 percent at mobile width with images and code blocks. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test mixed quote, list, code, paragraph, blank-line, and malformed nesting against tree and source-span invariants.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-nesting-evidence-152ih7
# Competency: ssg-nesting-evidence.
# Case 9519: a compromised-content recovery rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval.
# Changed case: insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic.
def evidence_ssg_nesting_evidence_152ih7(containers_opened: int = 7, containers_closed: int = 7, max_depth: int = 6, recovery_points: int = 2, stalled_positions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_152ih7 = "152ih7-7hi251-9519"
    assert evidence_variant_152ih7
    evidence_axes_152ih7 = (
        "reader152ih7",
        "source9519",
        "parse7hi251",
        "route152ih79519",
        "artifact9519152ih7",
        "recovery7hi2519519",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_152ih7)) == 6
    if containers_opened < 0 or containers_closed < 0:
        return False, containers_closed, "container-count"
    if containers_closed != containers_opened:
        return False, containers_closed, "container-balance"
    if max_depth < 0 or max_depth > 64:
        return False, max_depth, "depth-budget"
    if recovery_points < 1 or stalled_positions > 0:
        return False, stalled_positions, "recovery-progress"
    assert containers_closed == containers_opened
    return True, max_depth, "recoverable-nesting"
